<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Dumper\ContextProvider; /** * Interface to provide contextual data about dump data clones sent to a server. * * @author Maxime Steinhausser <maxime.steinhausser@gmail.com> */ interface ContextProviderInterface { public function getContext(): ?array; }
